name: Merchant Loans (상점 대출)
author: inggom
description: Borrow gold at the Act 1 merchant to afford an item you can't quite pay for. Taking a loan grants a Debt relic; leave it unpaid and Debt curse cards start seeping into your deck (14th room: 1, 17th: 3, 20th: 5), each draining gold as interest. Repay the principal at any shop — or let interest hit 200% of the loan — to retire the relic and clear every Debt card.
